name: Glazed Barbecued Beef Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beef brisket and season with salt and pepper.
2. Place the brisket in a roasting pan or Dutch oven.
3. Pour water into the pan, ensuring it covers about half of the brisket.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours to marinate.
5. Preheat your grill or smoker to around 225°F (107°C).
6. Place the brisket on the grill grate and cook until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C), about 2-3 hours.
7. Reduce heat to maintain a steady cooking temperature of around 200°F (93°C) and continue cooking for an additional 1-2 hours, or until the internal temperature reaches 190°F (88°C).
8. Remove the brisket from the grill and wrap it tightly in foil or butcher paper.
9. Let the brisket rest at room temperature for 30 minutes to 1 hour before slicing.
10. Slice the brisket against the grain and serve with your choice of barbecue sauce.
